## Summary

-

## Validation

- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] `bash scripts/build.sh`
- [ ] `bash scripts/test.sh`
- [ ] `bash scripts/ci.sh`

## Safety Checks

- [ ] Uses synthetic examples only.
- [ ] Adds no secrets, private snippets, private reports, logs, screenshots, screen recordings, transcripts, or crash reports.
- [ ] Preserves local-first runtime behavior for core reading and dictation unless explicitly approved.
- [ ] Keeps command-text snippets as text expansion only.
- [ ] Updates documentation and tests for changed behavior.

## Review

- [ ] Maintainer review required.
- [ ] Security review required for security-sensitive changes.
- [ ] Automated hosted review checked when available.
- [ ] Local Codex deep review completed for substantial changes.
